reviews.comment:
Soy socio vitalicio de la Institucion , vivo en Belgrano hace ya 45 años y desde entoces utilizo ésa agencia del ACA siempre fui muy bien atendido y me siento como en casa abrazo
Me atendió farias muy bien

(Translated by Google)
I'm a lifelong member of the institution. I've lived in Belgrano for 45 years, and I've been using this ACA agency ever since. I've always been very well treated and feel at home. Hugs.
Farias treated me very well.

reviews.comment:
Una estación completísima en servicios, en el medio de Belgrano, no solo por sus servicios (confitería, despacho de combustible, sanitarios, oficina ACA (consultar horarios y disponibilidad si se necesita usar), sino por la buena atención y predisposición de los empleados, lo cual permite seguir viaje disfrutando y tomando un descanso en un ambiente cálido y agradable. Si necesitas hacer una parada, sin lugar a dudas, disfrutarás de las instalaciones y la amabilidad de sus empleados

(Translated by Google)
A fully equipped station in the middle of Belgrano, not only for its services (candy shop, fuel station, restrooms, ACA office (check schedules and availability if you need to use it), but also for the good service and willingness of the employees, which allows you to continue your trip enjoying and taking a break in a warm and pleasant atmosphere. If you need to make a stop, without a doubt, you will enjoy the facilities and the friendliness of its employees.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN6dmZhbHRBRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, clean place and well attended by its staff.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN6dFlXLXVnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Malísima atención de los.playeros y el de seguridad. Super antipáticos, la chica de la noche maleducada, me puteo muy groseramente cuando le pedía q me cargara.mis.puntos serviclub. Recién vuelvo a cargar nafta y pregunté cómo hacia para estacionar y tomar un cafe y el playero me contestó re mal otra vez. Le pagaran poco? No puedo creer la MALA ONDA Q TIENEN TODOS,Menos los del restaurante, muy atentos.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service from the beach attendants and security guard. Super unfriendly. The night girl was rude and insulted me very rudely when I asked her to charge my Serviclub points. I just got back to fill up with gas and asked how I could park and get a coffee, and the beach attendant gave me a really rude answer again. Do they pay him too little? I can't believe how BAD EVERYONE IS, except for the restaurant staff, who were very attentive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN6b0xYLU93EAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
